Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"pitfall","key":"css-dissolve-not-crossfade","insight":"CSS opacity on a single video element cannot produce a true crossfade. Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"pitfall","key":"thumbnail-seek-chain-async","insight":"Setting video.currentTime without awaiting the seeked event yields frame 0. Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"architecture","key":"image-tick-onSwitchToVideo-callback","insight":"Image segments use wall-clock \(performance.now\(\)\) delta not video.currentTime.
